div1.entryFree:
Readiness, 1) a state of due preparation for what is to be done: I am joyful to hear of their r. Cor. IV, 3, 51. let's briefly put on manly r. Mcb. II, 3, 139 (i. e. dress ourselves; cf. Ready). *the r. is all, Hml. V, 2, 234. in r. == ready, prepared: Gent. I, 3, 70. Merch. II, 4, 33. Shr. I, 1, 43. H6A III, 1, 186. H6C II, 2, 67. V, 4, 64. R3 V, 3, 52. Tit. I, 325. Tim. I, 2, 172. Cymb. III, 5, 23. IV, 2, 336.
2) facility, ease: I thought, by your r. in the office, you had continued in it some time, Meas. II, 1, 275.
